prompt: We want to use Infisical to issue SSH certificates for our team so they can access production servers without managing SSH keys. How does this work and how do I set it up?
assertions: Explains CA-based architecture (Infisical generates CA key pair, signs certificates)
Shows correct config fields (allowed principals, key algorithm)
Recommends ED25519 as the key algorithm
Shows target host setup with TrustedUserCAKeys in sshd_config
Correctly states certificates CANNOT be renewed (must create new lease)
Shows correct SSH usage command with -i key.pem and -o CertificateFile=cert.pub
